name: contextcraft-skills
description: Reusable collaboration skills for Codex, Claude Code, and adjacent coding agents.

skills.name: collaboration-loop
skills.description: Build a closed-loop AI collaboration workflow across task intake, repo instructions, delivery reports, and retrospectives.

skills.name: repo-agent-map
skills.description: Create or audit short, true, executable repository instructions from real repository evidence.

skills.name: task-contract
skills.description: Turn ambiguous coding, product, writing, cleanup, refactor, debugging, or implementation requests into executable task contracts.
